notable_strains: Big Perm, BlVCK Runtz, Candy Panties, Charm Biscuits, Limóne OG, Murphy’z Law, Rainbow Walker, Zagave
verification_notes: MAS Alliance LLC operates under the brand name BLVCK MRKT. The company's CEO is Seth Murphy. The cultivation facility is located in Federalsburg, MD, on the site of a former Kraft Heinz factory. The precise address of the cultivation facility is not publicly available. The business address is listed as 1 South Street 30th Floor, Baltimore, Maryland 21202. Sources: https://www.marylandmas.com/, https://blvckmrktofficial.com/, https://www.bizjournals.com/baltimore/news/2024/11/25/mas-alliance-kraf

notable_strains: Not found
verification_notes: Carr Cann LLC is a new grower with a license issued in October 2025. The facility address was found in an Excel file from the Maryland Cannabis Administration. No website, brand information, or notable strains could be found. The company appears to be in the pre-operational phase.

verification_notes: The facility address was found on MapQuest, but not on the official website or in the consent order. The consent order redacts the address. The official website only lists a PO Box. The license number GA-23-00010 is from a consent order, while another consent order lists G-17-00004. The company appears to have multiple entities and licenses. The notable strains and sub-brands were found on Leafly and Weedmaps.

The company appears to be an independent, family-owned business, not part of a larger MSO. The facility address was obtained from an OSHA inspection record. Strain information was compiled from the company's website and Leafly product listings.

The list of notable strains is a selection of the most frequently mentioned strains across the various platforms.

Information was gathered from TerrAscend's website, Leafly, and press releases.

verification_notes: PC Cultivator, LLC is a licensed cannabis grower in Maryland, operating under the parent company PharmaCann. The primary consumer-facing brand is Verilife, with several sub-brands including matter., P3, and LivWell. The cultivation facility is located in Lothian, MD. Information was gathered from the Maryland Cannabis Administration, PharmaCann's website, Leafly, and Weedmaps.

notable_strains: Gary Payton, Blue Dream, Bubba Kush, Mandarin Gorilla, Mother's Finest
verification_notes: Marymed LLC is a subsidiary of Vireo Health, operating in Hurlock, Maryland. The facility address was found via a Maryland lobbying registration. The primary consumer-facing brand is Vireo, with a sub-brand called 1937 Cannabis. Notable strains were identified through Weedmaps. The operational status is presumed to be active based on a new union contract ratified in July 2025.
